subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast drawn nigh unto the light of guidance! His Holiness Moses, the One Who conversed with God, received the effulgence of divine identity from the Fire kindled in the Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبس نور هدی حضرت موسی کلیم الله فیض نور هویت را از نار موقده در شجره
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @Moses
